# Setu App
> Setu App - Sanatan Dharma, Daily Darshan & Hindu Temples URL: https://setu-ten-rust.vercel.app

Your digital bridge to Sanatan Dharma, Hindu Temples, Daily Panchang, and Indian Gods.

## About the Application
Setu App is an expansive platform focusing on:
- Discovering famous and local Hindu temples
- Providing accurate daily Panchang and Tithi calculations
- Sharing religious literature such as Mantras, Aartis, and Stutis
- Building a devoted spiritual community

## Available Public Routes
- **Home**: [https://setu-ten-rust.vercel.app](/)
  The main landing page featuring comprehensive information about the app's offerings.
- **Terms of Service**: [https://setu-ten-rust.vercel.app/terms](/terms)
  Rules and community guidelines surrounding the usage of the Setu App.
- **Privacy Policy**: [https://setu-ten-rust.vercel.app/privacy](/privacy)
  Information about how user location data and application usage is securely handled.

## Legal & Compliance
Data collected mainly revolves around optimizing spiritual feeds and geo-tagging local temples. We enforce strict community guidelines heavily moderated against content that hurts religious sentiments.
